title: kyllinga biglumis
intro: Kyllinga biglumis, also known as Kyllinga or Finger Grass, is a type of aquatic plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Kyllinga biglumis has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kyllinga biglumis include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even support liver function. In herbal preparations, Kyllinga biglumis is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, typically in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
